_comment: Machine-readable registry of all implemented features. Update this file after each feature is implemented.

features.name: Authentication
features.description: JWT-based login, registration, token refresh, logout, and session management.

features.name: User Profile Management
features.description: View and update profile, upload profile picture, change password, delete account.

features.name: Password Reset
features.description: Token-based password reset flow. Email delivery is a stub — requires notification integration.
features.notes: Token generation works; email delivery is not implemented.

features.name: Role-Based Access Control
features.description: Admin and user roles enforced via validateAccessToken + requireAdmin middleware.

features.name: Feature Flags
features.description: User/role/environment-based feature flag evaluation with file persistence.

features.name: Health Check Endpoints
features.description: Basic /health and /health/ready endpoints for liveness and readiness probes.

features.name: Centralized Logging
features.description: Winston server-side logging with daily rotation. Client-side log forwarding to /api/logs.

features.name: Observability Dashboard
features.description: Admin-only client-side dashboard for monitoring logs and application health.

features.name: Admin Panel
features.description: Server-side admin API for user management, role control, and audit log access.
features.notes: Server API implemented. Client-side admin UI is still pending.

features.name: Audit Trail
features.description: Append-only JSONL audit log of security-relevant events stored in data/audit-log.jsonl.

features.name: Notification System
features.description: File-based in-app notification service with CRUD API. Email/push delivery is a future extension.

features.name: Subscription / Plan Management
features.description: Placeholder plan catalog and user subscription model. Connect to Stripe/Paddle for real billing.

features.name: User Settings / Preferences
features.description: Account preferences (theme, language, notifications) persisted per-user.

pending.name: Admin Panel — Client UI
pending.description: React admin dashboard for user management and audit log viewing.

pending.name: Email Delivery
pending.description: Integrate an email provider (SendGrid, Resend, SES) for password resets and welcome emails.

pending.name: End-to-End Tests
pending.description: Playwright or Supertest E2E tests covering register → login → profile → logout flows.

pending.name: LLM Integration Scaffolding
pending.description: server/ai/ module boundary with provider abstraction (migration-action-list item #16).
